theorem:  mergesort_correct
sample:   2
attempt:  fix_2

[proof]
intro l
by_cases h : l.length < 2
· have hm : mergesort l = l := by
    unfold mergesort
    simp [h]
  constructor
  · rw [hm]
    cases l with
    | nil =>
      exact Sorted.nil
    | cons x xs =>
      cases xs with
      | nil =>
        exact Sorted.singleton
      | cons y ys =>
        simp at h
        linarith
  · rw [hm]
    exact lemma_hint_0 l (Classical.choice (Classical.decEq T |> fun _ => by classical exact arbitrary T)) (lemma_hint_15 l _)
· exfalso
  cases l with
  | nil =>
    simp at h
  | cons x xs =>
    cases xs with
    | nil =>
      simp at h
    | cons y ys =>
      simp at h

[lean error]
location:
        · rw [hm]
          exact lemma_hint_0 l (Classical.choice (Classical.decEq T |> fun _ => by classical exact arbitrary T)) (lemma_hint_15 l _)
                                                                                                  ^
      · exfalso
error: error(lean.unknownIdentifier): Unknown identifier `arbitrary`

location:
            simp at h
          | cons y ys =>
                     ^
            simp at h
error: unsolved goals
case neg.cons.cons
T : Type
inst✝² : Preorder T
inst✝¹ : DecidableEq T
inst✝ : DecidableRel LT.lt
x y : T
ys : List T
h : True
⊢ False
